name: LivaNova PLC
summary: Description of the Business and Background LivaNova PLC is a market-leading global medical technology company. The Company designs, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells products, therapies, and services that are consistent with LivaNovas mission to create ingenious medical solutions that ignite patient turnarounds.
